ValidationRule.description: Lead can't be converted if subsidiary and currency doesn't match. -12012024 Jasmin/Ceili
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: ( AND( ISPICKVAL(Status, "Converted to an Account"), IsConverted = true, OR( OR( ISPICKVAL(CV_Subsidiary__c, "FI"), ISPICKVAL(CV_Subsidiary__c, "Jodocus GmbH"), ISPICKVAL(CV_Subsidiary__c, "NL"), ISPICKVAL(CV_Subsidiary__c, "PL") ) && NOT(ISPICKVAL(CurrencyIsoCode, "EUR")), ISPICKVAL(CV_Subsidiary__c, "SE") && NOT(ISPICKVAL(CurrencyIsoCode, "SEK")), ISPICKVAL(CV_Subsidiary__c, "DK") && NOT(ISPICKVAL(CurrencyIsoCode, "DKK")), ISPICKVAL(CV_Subsidiary__c, "NO") && NOT(ISPICKVAL(CurrencyIsoCode, "NOK")), ISPICKVAL(CV_Subsidiary__c, "CH") && NOT(ISPICKVAL(CurrencyIsoCode, "CHF")), ISPICKVAL(CV_Subsidiary__c, "UK") && NOT(ISPICKVAL(CurrencyIsoCode, "GBP")), ISPICKVAL(CV_Subsidiary__c, "US") && NOT(ISPICKVAL(CurrencyIsoCode, "USD")) ) ) ) && $Setup.rh2__PS_Settings__c.rh2__Run_Validation_Rule__c
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Please choose the correct currency to correspond to the Eficode Subsidiary
